title: Simple Food Experience
description: Simple Food Experience is a lightweight, beginner-friendly Minecraft mod that adds a straightforward mechanic: almost any food item can be converted into experience.
body: Simple Food Experience is a lightweight, beginner-friendly Minecraft mod that adds a straightforward mechanic: almost any food item can be converted into experience. Designed to stay true to its name, the mod focuses on simplicity, balance, and convenience without introducing complex systems, machines, or progression trees. Players can use common foods—from basic farm crops to cooked meals and rare edibles—as a direct source of XP, making exploration, farming, and food collection more rewarding than ever. This creates a natural gameplay loop where gathering and preparing food is not only for survival but also for character growth, enchanting, and repairing gear. The mod is built to be compatible with a wide range of food types, including those from other mods, ensuring flexibility in modpacks while keeping the feature easy to understand and use. No complicated setup, no technical blocks—just food in, experience out, keeping the gameplay smooth, intuitive, and true to vanilla-friendly design.
